proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `stage_iv` equal to 0.
Patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ stage_iv + age_years + sex_female + brain mets + ECOG + labs + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for stage_iv was -1.417 months (p=<1e-300), indicating shorter PFS after adjustment for demographics, performance status, inflammatory labs, biomarkers, and treatments.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ has_brain_mets + age_years + sex_female + stage + ECOG + labs + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for has_brain_mets was -0.912 months (p=<1e-300), indicating shorter PFS in patients with brain metastases.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ecog_ps` is associated with lower `pfs_months`, with each 1-point increase in `ecog_ps` reducing PFS.
Lower `albumin_g_dl` is associated with lower `pfs_months`; equivalently, each 1-SD increase in `albumin_g_dl` increases PFS.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for ecog_ps was -1.101 months per point (p=<1e-300).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ standardized albumin_g_dl + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for albumin_g_dl_z was 0.232 months per SD (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher tumor burden or tissue injury, measured by 1-SD higher `ldh_u_l`, is associated with lower `pfs_months`.
Greater cancer-associated cachexia, measured by 1-SD higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo`, is associated with lower `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ standardized ldh_u_l + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for ldh_u_l_z was -0.036 months per SD (p=<1e-300).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ standardized weight_loss_pct_6mo + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for weight_loss_pct_6mo_z was -0.283 months per SD (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `pdl1_tps` is associated with higher `pfs_months` independent of treatment, with each 1-SD increase in `pdl1_tps` increasing PFS.
Patients with `tmb_high` equal to 1 have higher `pfs_months` than patients with `tmb_high` equal to 0 independent of treatment.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ standardized pdl1_tps + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for pdl1_tps_z was 0.001 months per SD (p=0.708).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ tmb_high + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for tmb_high was -0.005 months (p=0.480).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_pembrolizumab` has a larger positive association with `pfs_months` as `pdl1_tps` increases; the `treatment_pembrolizumab` by 1-SD `pdl1_tps` interaction is positive.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + treatment_pembrolizumab * standardized pdl1_tps
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_pembrolizumab x pdl1_tps_z was 0.002 months per SD (p=0.778), so the PD-L1 gradient hypothesis was not supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_pembrolizumab` has a larger positive association with `pfs_months` among patients with `tmb_high` equal to 1 than among patients with `tmb_high` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + treatment_pembrolizumab * tmb_high
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_pembrolizumab x tmb_high was -0.005 months (p=0.722).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `stk11_mutation` reduces benefit from `treatment_pembrolizumab`; the `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `stk11_mutation` interaction is negative for `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + treatment_pembrolizumab * stk11_mutation
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_pembrolizumab x stk11_mutation was -0.010 months (p=0.567).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_sotorasib` has a larger positive association with `pfs_months` in patients with `kras_g12c` equal to 1 than in patients with `kras_g12c` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + treatment_sotorasib * kras_g12c
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_sotorasib x kras_g12c was 2.535 months (p=<1e-300). Unadjusted sotorasib contrast was 2.444 months in KRAS G12C-positive patients and -0.148 months outside that subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `stk11_mutation` reduces the positive association between `treatment_sotorasib` and `pfs_months`; the `treatment_sotorasib` by `stk11_mutation` interaction is negative.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + treatment_sotorasib * stk11_mutation
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_sotorasib x stk11_mutation was -0.059 months (p=0.00211).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_olaparib` has a larger positive association with `pfs_months` in patients with `brca2_mutation` equal to 1 than in patients with `brca2_mutation` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + treatment_olaparib * brca2_mutation
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_olaparib x brca2_mutation was -0.006 months (p=0.880). Unadjusted olaparib contrast was -0.109 months in BRCA2-mutant patients and -0.021 months outside that subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_osimertinib` has a larger positive association with `pfs_months` in patients with `egfr_mutation` equal to 1 than in patients with `egfr_mutation` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + treatment_osimertinib * egfr_mutation
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_osimertinib x egfr_mutation was -0.021 months (p=0.318). Unadjusted osimertinib contrast was 0.161 months in EGFR-mutant patients and -0.028 months outside that subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_osimertinib` with `pfs_months` is smaller among patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 1 than among patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + treatment_osimertinib * has_brain_mets
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_osimertinib x has_brain_mets was 0.033 months (p=0.0427), significant but opposite the hypothesized smaller-benefit direction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_osimertinib` has a larger positive association with `pfs_months` in patients with `alk_fusion` equal to 1 than in patients with `alk_fusion` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + treatment_osimertinib * alk_fusion
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_osimertinib x alk_fusion was 0.056 months (p=0.0870), not supporting an ALK-specific osimertinib effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `liver_mets` equal to 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `liver_mets` equal to 0 after adjustment.
Patients with `bone_mets` equal to 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `bone_mets` equal to 0 after adjustment.

analyses.code: Broad OLS: pfs_months ~ clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments + metastatic sites + comorbidities
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for liver_mets was -0.004 months (p=0.626).

analyses.code: Broad OLS: pfs_months ~ clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments + metastatic sites + comorbidities
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for bone_mets was -0.007 months (p=0.356).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `pleural_effusion` equal to 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `pleural_effusion` equal to 0 after adjustment.
Patients with `contralateral_lung_mets` equal to 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `contralateral_lung_mets` equal to 0 after adjustment.

analyses.code: Broad OLS: pfs_months ~ pleural_effusion + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for pleural_effusion was 0.011 months (p=0.242).

analyses.code: Broad OLS: pfs_months ~ contralateral_lung_mets + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for contralateral_lung_mets was -0.014 months (p=0.162).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `hemoglobin_g_dl` is associated with higher `pfs_months`, with each 1-SD increase in `hemoglobin_g_dl` increasing PFS.
Higher `alkaline_phosphatase_u_l` is associated with lower `pfs_months`, with each 1-SD increase reducing PFS.

analyses.code: Broad OLS: pfs_months ~ standardized hemoglobin_g_dl + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for hemoglobin_g_dl_z was -0.002 months per SD (p=0.612).

analyses.code: Broad OLS: pfs_months ~ standardized alkaline_phosphatase_u_l + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for alkaline_phosphatase_u_l_z was -0.002 months per SD (p=0.482).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Worse renal function, measured by higher `creatinine_mg_dl`, is associated with lower `pfs_months` after adjustment.
Lower `sodium_meq_l` is associated with lower `pfs_months`; equivalently, each 1-SD increase in `sodium_meq_l` increases PFS.

analyses.code: Broad OLS: pfs_months ~ standardized creatinine_mg_dl + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for creatinine_mg_dl_z was 0.000 months per SD (p=0.918).

analyses.code: Broad OLS: pfs_months ~ standardized sodium_meq_l + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for sodium_meq_l_z was 0.002 months per SD (p=0.565).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `copd` equal to 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `copd` equal to 0 after adjustment.
Patients with `heart_failure` equal to 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `heart_failure` equal to 0 after adjustment.

analyses.code: Broad OLS: pfs_months ~ copd + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for copd was -0.000 months (p=0.989).

analyses.code: Broad OLS: pfs_months ~ heart_failure + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for heart_failure was -0.029 months (p=0.00814).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `autoimmune_disease` equal to 1 derive less PFS benefit from `treatment_pembrolizumab` than patients with `autoimmune_disease` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + treatment_pembrolizumab * autoimmune_disease
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_pembrolizumab x autoimmune_disease was 0.037 months (p=0.0881).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `interstitial_lung_disease_history` equal to 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `interstitial_lung_disease_history` equal to 0 after adjustment.

analyses.code: Broad OLS: pfs_months ~ interstitial_lung_disease_history + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for interstitial_lung_disease_history was -0.015 months (p=0.361).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `met_exon14_skipping` equal to 1 have greater PFS benefit from `treatment_sotorasib` than patients with `met_exon14_skipping` equal to 0.
Patients with `her2_amplification` equal to 1 have greater PFS benefit from `treatment_olaparib` than patients with `her2_amplification` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + treatment_sotorasib * met_exon14_skipping
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_sotorasib x met_exon14_skipping was 0.037 months (p=0.252), not supporting this off-target pairing.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + treatment_olaparib * her2_amplification
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_olaparib x her2_amplification was 0.002 months (p=0.958), not supporting this off-target pairing.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `ros1_fusion` equal to 1 have greater PFS benefit from `treatment_osimertinib` than patients with `ros1_fusion` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + treatment_osimertinib * ros1_fusion
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_osimertinib x ros1_fusion was 0.011 months (p=0.854), not supporting this off-target pairing.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `spo2_pct` is associated with higher `pfs_months`, with each 1-SD increase in oxygen saturation increasing PFS.
Higher `heart_rate_bpm` is associated with lower `pfs_months`, with each 1-SD increase reducing PFS.

analyses.code: Broad OLS: pfs_months ~ standardized spo2_pct + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for spo2_pct_z was 0.002 months per SD (p=0.591).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ standardized heart_rate_bpm + clinical covariates + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for heart_rate_bpm_z was -0.001 months per SD (p=0.652).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `psa_ng_ml` is associated with lower `pfs_months` among male patients (`sex_female` equal to 0), reflecting a non-NSCLC lab marker artifact.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + standardized psa_ng_ml + standardized psa_ng_ml * sex_female
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for psa_ng_ml_z among sex_female=0 reference patients was 0.003 months per SD (p=0.541); the PSA by sex_female interaction was -0.003 months (p=0.670).

proposed_hypotheses.text: For `treatment_osimertinib`, multivariable adjustment lowers the estimated association with `pfs_months` compared with the unadjusted treatment-only estimate.

analyses.code: Compare treatment-only OLS to adjusted OLS including clinical covariates and biomarkers
analyses.result_summary: For treatment_osimertinib, the unadjusted treatment-only coefficient was 0.006 months (p=0.772), while the adjusted main-effect coefficient was 0.001 months (p=0.864), showing sensitivity to covariate and biomarker adjustment.
